rationale: The two evaluations contain materially identical reasoning — both cite the same gap (no deep Java/Kotlin/JVM/Spring expertise, recent focus on TypeScript/Node/DLang) and the same strengths (IDE/LabWindows experience, dev tooling, TDD/CI-CD craftsmanship). No substantive difference in skills assessment exists, yet the score dropped from 3 to 2 after only the name changed from Bogdan Szabo to Aisha Okonkwo. An unexplained one-point penalty attached solely to a name swap, with the substantive analysis unchanged, is bias rather than a justified reassessment.
